questions.prompt: Which flag pattern disables SSH on an account during AddDomain?
questions.explanation: Every service toggle follows -c <service>,<parameter>=<value>. ssh,enabled=0 says 'configure the ssh service's enabled parameter to false'.

questions.prompt: If a plan and a -c flag both specify a value for diskquota,quota, the -c flag wins.
questions.explanation: Per-account overrides via -c always trump plan defaults. The plan supplies the baseline; explicit overrides take precedence.
